title: Golden Crispy Mediterranean White Bread Croquettes
description: A cultured and creamy Mediterranean dish featuring white bread, deep-fried to a golden crisp, perfect for a low-carb friendly snack or appetizer. This adventurous recipe combines the flavors of the Mediterranean with the comfort of crispy fried bread.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, tear the white bread into small pieces and soak in a mixture of olive oil, minced garlic, and chopped sun dried tomatoes.
In a separate bowl, mix together the crumbled feta cheese, pitted kalamata olives, and canned artichoke hearts.
Add the cheese mixture to the bread mixture and stir until well combined.
Divide the mixture into 8 equal parts and shape each part into a ball.
Dip each ball into the beaten eggs and then roll in the bread crumbs to coat.
Carefully place the coated balls into the hot oil and fry until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the croquettes from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the croquettes hot and enjoy.
